title: Business Intelligence Analyst (H/F)
description: ALTEN MOROCCO, a subsidiary of the world leader in engineering and technology consulting, was established in 2008 and is now present in Fes, Rabat, Tetouan, and Casablanca. With over 2,200 employees, ALTEN Morocco aims to reach a Center of Excellence of 3,300 engineers by the end of 2027. Today, it stands as a strategic player in supporting the professional development of engineers.Our mission: To meet the technological ambitions of our clients — leading international companies — in the automotive, rail, R&D, IT, telecommunications, and media sectors.Joining ALTEN Morocco means becoming part of a high-performance ecosystem and benefiting from: A personalized and evolving career path An ambitious skills development policy A stimulating, collaborative, and meaningful work environmentDescription Du PosteData Analysis & VisualizationCollaborate with department stakeholders to gather and understand business requirements and data needsExtract, transform, and analyze data from multiple sources to generate meaningful insightsDesign and develop interactive dashboards using Power BI with a focus on usability, clarity, and performanceCreate compelling visualizations, reports, and KPI tracking toolsApply best practices in data visualization, ensuring accuracy and consistencyDashboard & App DevelopmentIdentify relevant KPIs and performance indicators with business teamsDevelop dynamic dashboards and Power Apps applications tailored to departmental needsBuild user-friendly apps (forms, workflows, approval systems) to digitize and streamline business processesIntegrate Power Apps with Power BI dashboards and data sourcesImplement advanced features such as filters, drill-downs, and real-time updatesMaintain and continuously improve dashboards and apps based on user feedbackData Integration & AutomationUse Power Automate to streamline workflows and reporting processesAutomate data extraction, transformation, and refresh cyclesIntegrate data across systems in collaboration with ITDevelop Python scripts for data processing, automation, and advanced analyticsExplore and implement AI-based solutions (e.g., predictive analytics, intelligent automation, Copilot use cases)Data Governance & Quality AssurancePerform data validation, cleansing, and quality checksSupport implementation of data governance standards and best practicesAssist in data modeling and database design for optimized reportingQualificationsQualifications & RequirementsEducationBachelor’s or Master’s degree in Data Analytics, Information Systems, Computer Science, or a related fieldTechnical SkillsAdvanced MS Office skills (especially Excel)Strong your skills in a dynamic environment. You are passionate about service-oriented roles and wish to grow in a friendly and supportive workplace — join us!
